issues.title: [AI ECOSYSTEM][EPIC] Make Game Assistant a standalone coach and gateway capability
issues.body:
## Outcome

Keep the CLI-first coach independently usable while exposing evidence-based rhythm-game coaching to Quân Sư.

## Scope

- osu!mania first.
- Coach-only and non-cheat boundary.
- No Discord or game-client runtime dependency.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Requirements, contract, implementation, tests, QA, packaging, release, and maintenance are linked.
- [ ] Evidence, prompts, analysis, and player data remain in this repository.

issues.title: [REQUIREMENTS] Define gateway-safe game coaching use cases and evidence policy
issues.body:
## Outcome

Define the smallest Discord-mediated use cases without widening into live assistance.

## Scope

- Safe player summary, submit/reference a result, evidence-based review, training plan, and progress summary.
- Allowed evidence, retention, correction, duplicate handling, and unsupported formats.
- No autoplay, memory reading, anti-cheat bypass, or live tactical assistance.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Every use case defines structured input/output, side effects, idempotency, timeout, and safety refusal.
- [ ] Attachment and evidence ownership are explicit.
- [ ] CLI and gateway share application services.

issues.title: [INTEGRATION] Expose a stable game application-service contract
match_titles: [INTEGRATION][TASK] Expose a stable application-service contract for local gateways
issues.body:
## Outcome

Publish a versioned machine-readable contract for trusted local gateways.

## Scope

- Discovery, readiness, player summary, result submission/reference, coach review, training plan, and progress.
- Stable errors for invalid evidence, insufficient evidence, safety refusal, unavailable provider, timeout, and internal failure.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] No database tables, parser internals, or gameplay automation are exposed.
- [ ] Contract fixtures are deterministic and Discord-independent.
- [ ] At least one evidence-based operation works end to end.
- [ ] Standalone CLI remains usable.

issues.title: [IMPLEMENTATION] Build shared intake, analysis, review, and planning application services
issues.body:
## Outcome

Expose framework-neutral use cases behind CLI and gateway adapters.

## Scope

- Validated evidence registration, analysis, weakness diagnosis, coach review, training plan, and progress.
- Explicit transaction, duplicate, insufficient-evidence, and cancellation behavior.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] No Discord objects or paths from untrusted callers reach domain services.
- [ ] Writes are idempotent or reject duplicates predictably.
- [ ] Plans and reviews cite evidence references.
- [ ] Delivery failure does not duplicate analysis records.

issues.title: [IMPLEMENTATION] Add structured coach prompts and provider validation
issues.body:
## Outcome

Keep Ollama-generated coaching grounded in deterministic analysis and safety rules.

## Scope

- Versioned prompt contracts, structured outputs, evidence requirements, provider timeout/cancellation, and post-generation validation.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The model cannot invent evidence or override coach-only refusals.
- [ ] Insufficient evidence produces an explicit result.
- [ ] Prompts are not copied into Quân Sư or Mama.
- [ ] Fake provider tests cover all result forms.
